title: Auth Interceptor Implementation Plan
summary: Step-by-step TDD implementation plan for a ConnectRPC auth interceptor with API keys and implicit local identity fallback.
notes: This is an execution/implementation plan (task checklist with code snippets), not a PRD/SPEC/ADR. It references a companion design doc (2026-03-18-auth-interceptor-design.md) which likely holds the actual decisions/spec content; that doc should be classified separately as SPEC or ADR.
